name: Campaign Tracker — Optimización de Landing — Liquidacion Final

parameters.sqlQuery:
-- ============================================================
-- OPTIMIZACIÓN DE LANDING — Splinter + Eshop CPG
-- Fechas: 2026-05-19 → 2026-05-24
-- Landings: liquidacion-final
-- CPG (Carrefour, Full Súper): merge desde DM_ESHOP_LANDING_ATTRIBUTION
-- ============================================================

WITH splinter AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_EVENT                            AS date,
    LANDING_NAME                          AS landing_name,
    CAMPAIGN_NAME                         AS button_name,
    SUM(TOTAL_PRINTS)                     AS prints,
    SUM(TOTAL_CLICKS)                     AS clicks,
    SUM(TOTAL_TRANSACTION_24HS)           AS transactions,
    SUM(TOTAL_SI_24HS)                    AS si,
    SUM(TOTAL_TGMV_24HS)                  AS tgmv,
    SUM(TOTAL_SESSIONS_PRINT)             AS sessions
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_SPLINTER_COMPONENT`
  WHERE site_id = 'MLA'
    AND LANDING_NAME IN ('liquidacion-final')
    AND DATE_EVENT BETWEEN '2026-05-19' AND '2026-05-24'
  GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
),
eshop_cpg AS (
  SELECT
    TRACK_DATE                            AS date,
    SUM(TRANSACTIONS_24HS)                AS transactions,
    SUM(SI_24HS)                          AS si,
    SUM(TGMV_24HS)                        AS tgmv
  FROM `meli-bi-data.WHOWNER.DM_ESHOP_LANDING_ATTRIBUTION`
  WHERE SIT_SITE_ID = 'MLA'
    AND TRACK_DATE BETWEEN '2026-05-19' AND '2026-05-24'
    AND SHOP_NAME IN ('Carrefour', 'Full Súper')
  GROUP BY 1
),
combined AS (
  SELECT
    s.date,
    s.landing_name AS landing_name,
    s.button_name,
    COALESCE(s.prints, 0)                                        AS prints,
    COALESCE(s.clicks, 0)                                        AS clicks,
    CAST(COALESCE(s.transactions, e.transactions, 0) AS INT64)   AS transactions,
    CAST(COALESCE(s.si, e.si, 0) AS INT64)                       AS si,
    CAST(COALESCE(s.tgmv, e.tgmv, 0) AS INT64)                  AS tgmv,
    COALESCE(s.sessions, 0)                                      AS sessions
  FROM splinter s
  LEFT JOIN eshop_cpg e
    ON LOWER(s.button_name) LIKE '%cpg%'
    AND s.date = e.date
)
SELECT TO_BASE64(CAST(
  CONCAT(
    '{"opt_landing":',
    (SELECT TO_JSON_STRING(ARRAY_AGG(STRUCT(
      date, landing_name, button_name, prints, clicks, transactions, si, tgmv, sessions
    ) ORDER BY date, landing_name, button_name)) FROM combined),
    ',"refreshed_at":"',
    FORMAT_TIMESTAMP('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires'),
    '"}'
  )
AS BYTES)) AS data_b64
